one_time_description: Correction of an error: prior year deferred revenues from Indigenous Services Canada that did not meet the definition of a liability were reversed, increasing opening accumulated surplus by $655,102
economic_notes: COVID-19 impacted operations causing temporary office closures and delays in capital projects. First Nation has sawmill operations, campsite operations, forestry biomass project, industrial lot development, and 4-unit housing project. CMHC 4-unit housing loan of $850,000 obtained during year.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Five subsidiaries fully consolidated (Papasay Management Corporation, Papasay Value Added Wood Products Ltd., Papasay Value Added Wood Products LP, Wawasum Group Limited, 2626189 Ontario Ltd.). Two GBEs on modified equity basis (Papasay Management Limited Partnership, Wawasum Group LP). Correction of prior year error increased opening accumulated surplus by $655,102. Change in nature of investment in GBE from line-by-line to modified equity resulted in adjustment of $64,794. COVID-19 noted as significant event causing operational disruptions. Non-compliance with First Nations Financial Transparency Act posting deadline noted. Property ownership dispute contingency noted. Audit report dated February 12, 2021, which is after the FNFTA submission deadline of July 29, 2020. Prior year statements were audited by a different firm. Current liabilities calculated as accounts payable $333,991 plus due to government $29,389 = $363,380 (excluding deferred revenue and long-term debt current portion).
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
